laptop.note: Personal electronics are covered under renter's personal property coverage
laptop.upgrade: Consider replacement cost coverage for full value reimbursement

cell phone.note: Covered under personal property coverage up to policy limits
cell phone.upgrade: Consider scheduled personal property for high-end devices

tv.note: Televisions and electronics covered under personal property

car.note: Vehicles are NOT covered under renter's insurance — requires auto insurance
car.upgrade: Purchase auto insurance with comprehensive coverage

motorcycle.note: Motorcycles require separate motorcycle insurance policy

bicycle.note: Bicycles may have limited coverage — typically $1,000-$2,500 limit
conditions: Bike value may exceed policy sub-limits
bicycle.upgrade: Add scheduled personal property endorsement for expensive bikes

couch.note: Furniture is covered under personal property coverage
couch.upgrade: Consider replacement cost coverage for full reimbursement

bed.note: Bedroom furniture covered under personal property

dining table.note: Furniture covered under personal property coverage

chair.note: Furniture covered under personal property coverage

refrigerator.note: Landlord appliances are NOT covered — landlord is responsible
refrigerator.upgrade: Your landlord's insurance covers this, but consider renter's coverage if you own the fridge

microwave.upgrade: If you own the microwave, it would be covered — verify ownership

oven.note: Landlord fixtures and appliances are NOT covered

book.note: Personal belongings including books are covered
book.upgrade: Rare or valuable books may need scheduled coverage

clock.note: Personal items covered under personal property
clock.upgrade: Antique or valuable clocks need scheduled coverage

backpack.note: Personal belongings covered on and off premises
backpack.upgrade: Expensive designer bags may need additional coverage

sports ball.note: Sports equipment covered under personal property
sports ball.upgrade: High-end equipment may need scheduled coverage

potted plant.note: Plants covered up to policy limits (typically $500)

dog.note: Pets are NOT covered property — but liability for bites may be
dog.upgrade: Consider pet insurance or animal liability coverage

cat.note: Pets are NOT covered as property items
cat.upgrade: Consider pet insurance for veterinary coverage

bottle.note: Household items covered under personal property
bottle.upgrade: Collectible bottles may need scheduled coverage

mouse.note: Computer accessories covered under personal property

keyboard.note: Computer accessories covered under personal property

remote.note: Electronics accessories covered under personal property

toaster.note: Small appliances you own are covered

umbrella.note: Personal items covered under personal property
